# Pull request

## Summary

<!-- Explain the user-visible or operator-visible outcome. -->

## Security and operational impact

<!--
Describe changes to authority, permissions, secrets, webhook processing,
fail-closed behavior, persistence, deployment, migration, or rollback. Write
"None" only after considering each category.
-->

## Verification

<!-- List exact commands and relevant test cases. Do not paste secrets or private data. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior and failure paths.
- [ ] I updated user, configuration, deployment, or operations documentation where needed.
- [ ] I considered compatibility and documented any migration or rollback constraint.
- [ ] I used least privilege and did not add credentials or private data.
- [ ] I ran `mise run check`, or explained any check I could not run.
- [ ] Every commit includes a Developer Certificate of Origin sign-off.
